element_introduction_order.element: Basic flight controls and cockpit interface
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Training exercise environment in Nevada with controlled scenarios
Padlock view feature allows player to track selected targets before engaging
Combat scenarios with enemy aircraft in controlled training exercises

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Campaign engine (Iraq, Israel, Panama fictional wars)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Limited supplies of pilots, aircraft, and weapons with periodic replenishment
Unique mountain, hill, valley topography shapes require spatial awareness
Multi-mission campaigns with persistent aircraft and pilot availability constraints

typical_relief_triggers: Successful target lock and missile launch
Returning to base after mission completion
typical_tension_triggers: Low fuel warnings during extended missions
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Asymmetric: tutorial mode provides controlled pacing with structured progression; campaign mode creates variable tension through persistent resource constraints and multi-mission objectives

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Red Flag tutorial mode serves as optional training pathway before campaign engagement

difficulty_curve.early_game: Red Flag tutorial mode provides graduated introduction to flight mechanics, radar systems, and basic combat; controlled Nevada training environment
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Campaign scenarios introduce resource management complexity alongside combat; player manages limited pilot pools and aircraft availability across multiple missions
difficulty_curve.late_game: Sustained campaign warfare with compounding resource scarcity and accumulated aircraft damage; multi-front fictional conflicts requiring strategic decision-making
notable_spikes: First transition from tutorial (Red Flag) to campaign mode
Introduction of resource-constrained warfare in campaign engine
Multi-mission campaigns requiring sustained pilot and aircraft management

notable_level_patterns.description: Structured training mode simulating actual US Air Force Red Flag exercise; provides graduated introduction to flight dynamics, avionics, radar systems, and air-to-air combat before campaign engagement

Dynamic campaign engine with persistent world state; simulates wars across geographically distinct regions (Iraq, Israel, Panama) with limited replenishing supplies of pilots, aircraft, and weapons; individual mission outcomes affect campaign progression
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Iraq, Israel, and Panama campaign scenarios

notable_level_patterns.description: Topographically unique landscapes (mountains, hills, valleys) serve as both obstacles and tactical cover; terrain features have distinct shapes requiring spatial navigation skills developed in tutorial
